name: bug-fix
description: Structured bug fix workflow: reproduce, fix, test, verify

team.name: debugger
team.role: Senior debugger — reproduces issues, identifies root cause, writes minimal fix

team.name: verifier
team.role: Verification specialist — reviews fix correctness and test coverage

tasks.title: Reproduce and diagnose

expectations.criteria: Root cause is clearly identified with specific file:line references, and a reproduction path is documented

tasks.title: Implement fix
tasks.description:
Based on the diagnosis, implement a minimal, targeted fix for: {{issue}}

Rules:
- Fix the root cause, not symptoms
- Minimal change surface — don't refactor unrelated code
- Add or update tests to cover the fixed behavior
- All existing tests must still pass

tasks.title: Verify fix
tasks.description:
Review the fix for: {{issue}}

Verify:
1. The fix addresses the root cause identified in diagnosis.md
2. The change is minimal and doesn't introduce side effects
3. Test coverage is adequate for the fix
4. Edge cases are handled

expectations.criteria: Fix correctly addresses the root cause, is minimal, and has adequate test coverage
